sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports a risk of a strong reaction to blood products and frequent infections. He also reports pain in the left hand and severe diarrhea. The patient believes their cold symptoms are unusual.
medical_concepts: risk of strong reaction to blood products

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is mildly low. Heart rate is within normal limits. Neurologic examination is nonfocal. The patient has a history of iga deficiency.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has type two diabetes and an iga deficiency. He may experience respiratory tract infections, sinus infections, and abdominal infections. The patient's family owns a donut shop.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Start metformin. Order blood transfusions. Follow up in one week to assess response to treatment. Schedule a return visit if symptoms worsen.

medical_concepts: risk of strong reaction to blood products
